title: Design a Bank System
statementMd:
Design a simple bank.

- `open(id)` — open an account with the given id and balance `0`. Opening an existing id has no effect.
- `deposit(id, amount)` — add `amount` to the account; return `true` if the account exists, else `false`.
- `transfer(from, to, amount)` — move `amount` from one account to another; return `true` only if both accounts exist and `from` has at least `amount`, else `false`.
- `balance(id)` — return the account balance, or `-1` if it does not exist.
hints: A hash map from account id to balance is enough to track state.
Every operation must first validate that the account(s) exist.
A transfer succeeds only if the source exists, the destination exists, and the source has enough balance.
